case_title: JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC. VS. AMPIE G ENRILE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF EMILY IGURG IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT ( CCP 585) (TRANSACTION ID # 100055390) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC.
